name: AutomaticDurationString NTTP
description: Fixed-size compile-time string usable as non-type template parameter. Enables type-level string identity.

name: makeAutomaticDurationString variadic concatenation
description: Concatenates multiple string literals into a single AutomaticDurationString at compile time using fold expressions over copy_n.

name: User-defined literal operator _ads
description: Enables "KEY"_ads syntax for creating AutomaticDurationString NTTPs inline.

name: ArgumentBuffer typed stdin key-value parser
description: Type-safe stdin line parser parameterized by NTTP string key. Type identity IS the argument name.

name: ArgumentBuffers variadic tuple of typed parsers
description: Tuple of ArgumentBuffer<Key>... with readLines() using index_sequence fold, getValueViews() returning typed tuple, forward() for piping.

name: Index sequence fold for sequential tuple operations
description: [&]<size_t... Indices>(std::index_sequence<Indices...>) idiom for iterating tuple elements with short-circuit && fold.

name: Constexpr float parser
description: Hand-written constexpr parseFloat for compile-time string-to-float conversion. Handles sign, integer, decimal.

name: Sequence NTTP tag type
description: Wraps AutomaticDurationString NTTP into a type with static view. Type-level identifiers from string literals for parser rules.

name: Rule/Sequence recursive descent DSL
description: Type-level grammar: Rule<Sequence, ResultType, SubRules...>. Compile-time parser schema using template parameters as grammar productions.

name: ParseStructuredSequentialData compile-time parser
description: Full compile-time recursive descent parser. Parses OBJ/MTL format at compile time using Rule/Sequence schema with LogicalBlockRange tracking.

name: ParseLogicalBlock recursive template evaluation
description: Recursive compile-time block parser. Counts elements via constexpr loop, computes sub-ranges, dispatches to sub-rules via index_sequence.

name: CtoObjSchema type-level grammar
description: Wavefront OBJ schema as nested Rule types. Grammar IS the type hierarchy.

name: CtoMtlSchema type-level grammar
description: Wavefront MTL schema: Definition contains DiffuseColor and Opacity.

name: CompileTimeDeserialize specialization pattern
description: Forward-declared class template specialized per ResultType+StringProvider. Open extension point for compile-time deserialization.

name: GlObject template RAII wrapper
description: GlObject<ContextType, CreateFunc, DeleteFunc> — generic RAII for OpenGL resources. Create/Delete as NTTP lambdas. bind() returns scoped Context.

name: GetGlObject partial specialization dispatch
description: Specializations for buffer types, vertex arrays, textures, renderbuffers, framebuffers. Each provides Context with type-appropriate operations.

name: Context RAII scoped binding
description: Constructor binds GL resource, destructor unbinds. Non-copyable, non-movable. GL state always properly bracketed.

name: NTTP lambdas as template parameters
description: Stateless lambdas passed as non-type template parameters for GL create/delete functions.

name: Type alias chain for GL resource types
description: GlVertexArray, GlVertexBuffer etc. as named types inheriting from GetGlObject specializations.

name: VertexTrait base with static properties
description: VertexTrait<N> provides static constexpr elementType/Count/Size. Position, Normal inherit. Traits as composable building blocks.

name: Vertex variadic trait composition
description: Vertex<Traits...> auto-calculates stride via fold, generates VertexAttribute array via index_sequence, copies trait data via fold.

name: Compile-time stride via fold expression
description: (... + (Traits::elementCount * Traits::elementSize)) — fold computing vertex stride from trait parameters.

name: Compile-time vertex attribute array generation
description: static constexpr auto attributes via IILE + index_sequence. Each offset from recursive accumulateOffset template.

name: Recursive offset accumulation
description: accumulateOffset<Result, Index, First, Rest...> recursively sums trait sizes. Compile-time offset calculation.

name: flattenVertices constexpr array transformation
description: Transforms Vertex struct array into flat GLfloat array at compile time for GPU consumption.

name: Fold expression for trait data copy
description: Comma fold copying each trait's data sequentially into vertex buffer via std::copy.

name: Structured binding decomposition in render loop
description: Nested const auto& [...] = decomposition of SimulationObject then Model. Code reads as character introduction.

name: HasType tuple membership check
description: std::disjunction over std::is_same to check tuple membership at compile time.

name: HasDerivedType tuple base-class search
description: std::disjunction over std::is_base_of. Checks if any tuple element derives from a given type.

name: void_t SFINAE tag detection
description: HasVirtualTag, HasPublicTag, HasProtectedTag, HasPrivateTag — detect nested type tags via void_t. Compile-time reflection.

name: DerivedTypeIndex recursive tuple search
description: Recursively searches tuple for type derived from given base. Returns index or -1. SFINAE + constexpr IILE branching.

name: GetDerivedElementFromVirtualTaggedBase
description: Wraps DerivedTypeIndex into std::get<index>. Compile-time virtual dispatch as tuple element access.

name: IsFunction concept with tag detection
description: Concept requiring operator(), default_initializable, optional Virtual/access tags. Validates TypeTable function members.

name: IsDataField concept
description: Concept requiring .value member. Minimal structural requirement for TypeTable data fields.

name: AllTypesSatisfyConcept recursive validation
description: Takes consteval concept lambda + tuple, recursively checks all elements satisfy concept. Terminal on empty tuple.

name: Concept-as-consteval-lambda
description: [] <typename T> () consteval { return IsParent<T>; } — passes concept as value to template. Novel technique for validating heterogeneous tuple contents.

name: HasTupleValueSatisfyingConcept
description: Concept: T has .value, it's a tuple, all elements satisfy a given concept. Bridges structural requirements with tuple validation.

name: TypeTable metaclass decomposition
description: TypeTable<Hierarchy, Functions, DataFields> — decomposes class into three concept-validated tuple containers. access() provides scoped ThisContext.

name: ThisContext scoped accessor
description: Inner class with get<DataField>() and invoke<Function>(). Dispatches via HasType then DerivedTypeIndex with nullopt fallback.

name: access() callback pattern
description: Constructs ThisContext and passes to callable. Scoped access without exposing internals. AccessingType defaults to Public.

name: Namespace-as-class pattern
description: Shape, Circle, Rectangle as namespaces with struct members and using Type = TypeTable<...>. Classes without the class keyword.

name: forEach heterogeneous tuple iteration
description: index_sequence fold applying function to each tuple element. Polymorphic iteration over heterogeneous types.

name: Compile-time polymorphic dispatch
description: forEach + access + invoke<Shape::Draw>() — dispatch across heterogeneous TypeTables without vtables. Each type resolved via DerivedTypeIndex.

name: Inheritance-based function overriding
description: Circle::Draw : public Shape::Draw. DerivedTypeIndex finds derived Draw when searching for base. C++ inheritance repurposed as dispatch tag.

name: IsTuple type trait
description: Detects std::tuple instantiation via partial specialization.

name: satisfies_concept type trait
description: Bridges template-template concepts to value-level bool via requires-constrained specialization.

name: Parent composite type
description: Parent<AccessSpecifier, TypeTable> pairs access level with parent. Building block for Hierarchy.

name: Hierarchy as tuple of Parents
description: Hierarchy<Parents...> wraps std::tuple<Parents...>. Inheritance becomes data. Multiple inheritance is tuple concatenation.

name: Functions as concept-constrained tuple
description: Every element must satisfy IsFunction. Concept constraint on variadic parameter pack.

name: DataFields with constructor forwarding
description: Concept-constrained tuple with constructor. Each element must have .value member.

name: Access specifier tag types
description: struct Public/Protected/Private {}; — empty tags for compile-time access control. Visibility as data.

name: Virtual dispatch tag
description: struct Virtual {}; nested in function. Detected by HasVirtualTag via void_t. Marks function for derived-type dispatch.

name: Raw string literal batching
description: Splits file contents across multiple R"DELIMITER()DELIMITER" segments to stay under 65536 char limit. Reconnected via makeAutomaticDurationString.

name: toCamelCase identifier generation
description: Converts filenames to PascalCase type names. Deterministic identifier generation from file paths.

name: IILE for scoped buffer initialization
description: static auto buffer = [&]{ ... }() with static_assert inside. One-time initialization with validation.

name: IILE inside designated initializer
description: .outputDirectory = []{ auto buf = ...; buf.readLine(); return ...; }() — inline derivation in construction.

name: Index sequence fold for processFile
description: Fold over heterogeneous file tuple. (processFile(std::get<Indices>(assetFiles)), ...);

name: IILE for vertex construction
description: IILEs inside designated initializers for .position and .normal with assertion and optional return.

name: IILE for get-or-create pattern
description: [&]() -> size_t { find or insert and return index; }() — map lookup with lazy insertion.

name: Namespace-scoped formatting strategies
description: using namespace spaceDelimited::array; using namespace newlineDelimited::vector; — imported formatting via operator<< overloads.

name: parse_and_validate_arguments
description: Wraps cmake_parse_arguments twice. Mandatory parameter enforcement with FATAL_ERROR. PARENT_SCOPE propagation.

name: make_named_tuple
description: Key=value pairs from parallel PARAMETER_SET and ARGUMENTS. Length validation. Named tuples in CMake.

name: compile_assets tool pipeline
description: Chains GenerateAssetData | BatchStringifyFiles via add_custom_command with stdin/stdout. Custom target for deps.

name: batch_stringify_files per-file targets
description: Generates arg file via cmake -E echo chain, runs tool, creates per-file custom targets for incremental builds.

name: PARENT_SCOPE variable propagation
description: foreach over param names setting each to PARENT_SCOPE. CMake's return-value mechanism.

name: Restore-Emscripten idempotent
description: Check toolchain exists, install if not, activate if env var missing. Run twice, same result.

name: Restore-Vcpkg idempotent
description: Check vcpkg.exe, bootstrap if missing. Clean corrupt state before rebuild.

name: Restore-PortDependencies JSON-driven
description: Reads PortDependencies.json, resolves platform triplet, installs only missing packages.

name: Scriptblock error propagation
description: $assertExitCode = { if ($?) { return }; exit $LastExitCode } — reusable exit code checking.

name: Nested function scoping
description: Functions defined inside functions, visible only where meaningful. Scoped build orchestration.

name: ValidateSet parameter contracts
description: [CmdletBinding()] with [ValidateSet] on Target and CMakeBuildType. CLI contract enforcement.

name: Stdin/stdout KEY=value cross-layer protocol
description: C++ ArgumentBuffer reads KEY=value. CMake writes via cmake -E echo. PowerShell generates arg files. Three languages, one protocol.

name: Named validated parameters at every layer
description: CMake: parse_and_validate_arguments. C++: ArgumentBuffer<KEY_ads>. PowerShell: [ValidateSet]. Same idea, three idioms.

name: Idempotency at every layer
description: CMake guards, PowerShell Restore-*, C++ constexpr determinism. Convergent by design at every level.

name: Failed: constexpr virtual through base reference
description: std::array<Foo&, 2> erases derived type. Compiler knows both types at declaration but loses through array.

name: Failed: TypeTag inheritance for identity
description: Carrying type identity through inherited tags. Base reference loses derived type at compile time.

name: Failed: address-based type ID in constexpr
description: Template variable addresses as unique IDs. reinterpret_cast forbidden in constexpr.

name: Failed: sizeof probing for type identity
description: Recursive staticAssertSizeof to distinguish types by size. sizeof not unique across types.

name: Sketch: compile-time evolutionary organisms
description: SimulateOrganisms, Reproduce, Crossover — types that reproduce by combining TypeTables. Unfinished but conceptually complete.
